title: Technique Level 6A — Trill Exercises
summary: Written-out trill patterns on every scale degree in multiple keys — building finger speed and evenness for ornamental playing.

exercises.title: Trill C-D RH
exercises.summary: Written-out trill alternating C4 and D4 in eighth notes.
exercises.goal: Play the C-D trill evenly at 100 BPM — no accent on either note.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill D-E RH
exercises.summary: Written-out trill alternating D4 and E4.
exercises.goal: Play the D-E trill evenly — weak-finger pair (2-3).

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill E-F RH
exercises.summary: Written-out trill alternating E4 and F4.
exercises.goal: Play the E-F trill — 3-4 finger pair, often the weakest.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill F-G RH
exercises.summary: Written-out trill alternating F4 and G4.
exercises.goal: Play the F-G trill — 4-5 finger pair at 96 BPM.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree C Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the C major scale ascending.
exercises.goal: Move the trill up the scale — shift hand position smoothly between trills.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree C Major LH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the C major scale, left hand.
exercises.goal: Move the trill up the scale in the left hand — build LH trill strength.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree G Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the G major scale.
exercises.goal: Navigate trills through G major with F#.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree D Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the D major scale.
exercises.goal: Navigate trills through D major with F# and C#.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree F Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the F major scale.
exercises.goal: Navigate trills through F major with Bb.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree A Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the A major scale.
exercises.goal: Navigate trills through three sharps in A major.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Long Trill C-D with Resolution RH
exercises.summary: Extended trill on C with D, resolving to E — Baroque trill practice.
exercises.goal: Sustain a long trill evenly and resolve cleanly to the target note.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Long Trill E-F with Resolution RH
exercises.summary: Extended trill on E with F, resolving to G.
exercises.goal: Sustain the weakest-finger trill (3-4) and resolve cleanly.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill with Accompaniment in C HT
exercises.summary: Right hand trill over left hand sustained chords.
exercises.goal: Maintain an even trill while the other hand holds steady — independence test.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill with Accompaniment in G HT
exercises.summary: Right hand trill over left hand G major chords.
exercises.goal: Maintain a trill over chord changes in G major.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree Bb Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the Bb major scale.
exercises.goal: Navigate trills through Bb major with two flats.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill on Each Scale Degree Eb Major RH
exercises.summary: One-beat trill on each note of the Eb major scale.
exercises.goal: Navigate trills through three flats in Eb major.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Speed Trill C-D at 112 BPM RH
exercises.summary: Fast trill at elevated tempo — pushing finger speed.
exercises.goal: Sustain an even trill at 112 BPM — speed and control combined.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill Chain C Major Ascending RH
exercises.summary: Chain of short trills moving up the C major scale without stopping.
exercises.goal: Shift trill positions seamlessly while ascending — a Baroque staple.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill Chain C Major Ascending LH
exercises.summary: Chain of short trills moving up the C major scale in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Build left hand trill strength ascending through C major.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Trill Mastery Review HT
exercises.summary: Both hands trill exercises across C, G, D keys — the L6A mastery test.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate trill fluency in both hands across multiple keys.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
